name: Camera Sensor Cleaning: The Ultimate Step-by-Step Guide

step.name: Ideal Cleaning Workspace : Seek a clean, dust-free area to perform sensor cle...
step.text: Ideal Cleaning Workspace : Seek a clean, dust-free area to perform sensor cleaning. Gather your essential tools like sensor swabs and camera sensor cleaning fluid, designed specifically for this delicate process.

step.name: Fully Charged Battery : Always start with a full battery to prevent the camer...
step.text: Fully Charged Battery : Always start with a full battery to prevent the camera from shutting off during the cleaning process. A camera suddenly powering down could damage the sensor or other internal elements.

step.name: Lens and Memory Card attached : You may need to take multiple shots before an...
step.text: Lens and Memory Card attached : You may need to take multiple shots before and after each clean to determine spot removal.
